calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Christopher San Clement To Perpetuate Testimony Of Kimball Sanclemente By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner and moving party Christopher San Clement.
Eric D. Sentlinger of POND NORTH LLP (415-217-1240), specially appearing for defendant Fraser Boiler Service, Inc.
Jonathan Kim of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), specially appearing for defendant Marconi Plastering Company.
Karen L. Prodromo of MORGAN LEWIS & BOCKIUS (415-442-1141), specially appearing for defendant Grinnell & Goulds.
Taylor Matsumoto of BERKES CRANE ROBINSON & SEAL LLP (213) 955-1150, specially appearing through CourtCall for Defendant Chicago Pneumatic Tool Company LLC.

RULING: PETITION OF CHRISTOPHER SAN CLEMENT TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF KIMBALL SANCLEMENTE BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION
Hearing held, not argued, and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Christopher San Clement to Perpetuate Testimony of Kimball SanClemente by Videotaped Deposition is Granted. Petitioner filed a proof of service as to Grinnell LLC (FKA Grinnell Corporation AKA Grinnell Fire) and amended proofs of service as to all other prospective defendants named in the petition. No opposition filed. Kimball SanClemente's deposition will take place in Palm Desert, California on March 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Christopher San Clement To Perpetuate Testimony Of Kimball Sanclemente By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Continued To Feb-13-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Christopher San Clement To Perpetuate Testimony Of Kimball Sanclemente By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-23-2020 Continued To Jan-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner and moving party Christopher San Clement.
Eric D. Sentlinger of POND NORTH LLP (415-217-1240), specially appearing for defendant Fraser Boiler Service, Inc.
Jason Kort of BERKES CRANE ROBINSON & SEAL LLP (213-955-1150), specially appearing for defendant Chicago Pneumatic Tool Co.
Jonathan Kim of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), specially appearing for defendant Marconi Plastering Company.

RULING: PETITION OF CHRISTOPHER SAN CLEMENT TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF KIMBALL SANCLEMENTE BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION
Hearing held and the Court continues the Petition of Christopher San Clement to Perpetuate Testimony of Kimball SanClemente by Videotaped Deposition to January 30, 2020 at 9:30a.m. for Petitioner to file a proof of service as to defendant Grinnell LLC. Petitioner's Declaration of Lisa Johnson submitted to court re: Grinnell LLC dated January 22, 2020. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
